name: Launch Campaign Raffle: 50 winners
description:
On 11/03, the raffle begins!
**50 winners** will collect rewards.

1st: $700 → 233,333 EHX
2nd: $350 → 116,667 EHX
3rd: $200 → 66,667 EHX
4th–10th: $50 → 16,667 EHX (each)
11th–50th: $10 → 3,333 EHX (each)

All rewards are paid in Eterna's EHX token.

**Disclaimer:**
50 winners will be selected through the raffle mechanism. The final reward ranking will be determined by the time each winner joined the raffle, with earlier entries receiving higher-ranked rewards.

EHX rewards will be distributed no later than 18/03/2026.

name: Mission 3 % : Passe à l’action
description:
Tu arrives à la dernière étape de la Mission 3 %.

Découvre les opportunités disponibles sur Bybit EU et complète les actions suivantes pour finaliser la mission.

Étapes à suivre pour les nouveaux utilisateurs :

- Visite la page de la campagne 3 % sur Bybit EU
(tu dois être connecté à ton compte pour y accéder)

- Dépose au moins 100 € sur la plateforme via Apple Pay ou Google Pay ou CB classique, ou en crypto. Tu débloqueras 40 € de bonus.  

- Dépose tes EURC sur la pool EURC à 20 % de rendement pendant 7 jours via Bybit Earn.  Seuls les nouveaux utilisateurs Bybit EU peuvent souscrire à cette pool. 

Afin de rester éligible au tirage au sort pour une part des 2 500 € en BTC, conserve tes fonds sur Bybit EU jusqu’au 31 mars.

Une fois ces étapes complétées, tu auras terminé toutes les quests de la mission et pourras participer au tirage au sort.

Note importante : Un UID te sera demandé pour ces quêtes. Voici comment le retrouver sur ton compte : 

Si tu es sur ton ordinateur, il se trouve en haut à droite de l'écran : 

![UID Desktop.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/942b39a0-f487-42fe-8ad7-7d517ec54333.png)

Si tu es sur l'app Bybit EU, l'UID se trouve à côté de ton avatar : 

![UID APP.jpg](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/69b9bb9f-2286-4ff9-b16f-04173e5eb75b.jpeg)

name: Mission Inscription & Vérification
description:
Rejoins l’écosystème Bybit EU et franchis une nouvelle étape de la mission.

Pour valider cette quête :

- Crée ton compte sur Bybit EU

- Complète la vérification d’identité sur la plateforme

Une fois ta vérification d’identité validée, tu débloqueras également un bonus de 5 € en BTC sur ton compte.

La création de ton compte te permettra aussi d’accéder aux campagnes en cours sur Bybit EU, notamment :

- 3 % d’APY sur tes dépôts

- 20 % d’APR sur l’EURC via Bybit Earn

Continue les prochaines quêtes pour te rapprocher du tirage au sort et tenter de remporter une part des 2 500 € en BTC.

Note importante : Un UID te sera demandé pour ces quêtes. Voici comment le retrouver sur ton compte : 

Si tu es sur ton ordinateur, il se trouve en haut à droite de l'écran : 

![UID Desktop.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/942b39a0-f487-42fe-8ad7-7d517ec54333.png)

Si tu es sur l'app Bybit EU, l'UID se trouve à côté de ton avatar : 

![UID APP.jpg](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/69b9bb9f-2286-4ff9-b16f-04173e5eb75b.jpeg)

name: KOMmunity Learn with Troyvest
description:
Dive deep into the project with Troyvest KOMmunity Learn Campaign! Testing the knowledge of participants and discovering interesting facts about the project. This quiz is designed to both challenge and educate. With questions ranging from basic to advanced, it's a fun way to engage with the project details and perhaps learn something new.

Campaign Period : 
9th March - 27th March, 2026
Prize Pool : 
1,250,000 $TROY
Winner : 
100  

Disclaimer:
The reward distribution process will be conducted manually, with announcements made exclusively on our Official Telegram and Discord platforms. Please note that rewards in Galxe will be limited to loyalty points only. Distribution will begin after the event concludes. However, potential delays in the project token listing or unforeseen circumstances could affect the timing of the reward disbursement.

name: Doma Pool Party
description:
Liquidity keeps the markets moving.

Easier quest for you all this week!

Add liquidity to any pool on Doma.

Your position must include 5 USDC.e or more.

The liquidity can be added at any time (before or during the quest), but it must stay in range until the quest ends.

Credentials update daily around 2:00 PM UTC.
Final update runs 1 hour before the quest ends.

name: ADREVA Ad Army - Early Access
description:
# 🚀 Adreva Launches Phase I of the Attention Economy!

Consumers have long been treated as products — not participants.
Your attention powers the digital economy, yet you’ve never shared in the value it creates.

Today, Adreva changes that.
Instead of extracting value, Adreva lets you direct and share in the value your attention creates.

Welcome to Phase I of the Attention Economy — where projects and users work together to curate, engage, and amplify attention campaigns.

This system is powered by two (2) core programs:

## 1️⃣ Weekly Attention Campaign (WAC)

Where users engage with and amplify projects
👉 https://www.adreva.ai/weekly-attention-campaign

## 2️⃣ Adreva Ad Army

A community referral program for bringing advertisers to Adreva
👉 https://www.adreva.ai/ad-army

--

## 📢 Weekly Attention Campaign (WAC)

Advertisers secure campaign slots and the community engages and amplifies projects through:

🏆 Leaderboard competitions
⭐ Galxe quests
📣 Social engagement
🎨 Creative contests

Projects can secure participation on a first-come-first-served basis.

🥉 Bronze — $100
🥈 Silver — $200
🥇 Gold — $300

👉 https://www.adreva.ai/weekly-attention-campaign

--

## ⚔️ Adreva Ad Army

The Ad Army allows community members to earn rewards by referring advertisers to Adreva.

Members receive:

💰 25% USDC commission

🏆 Leaderboard points & prizes

⚔️ Discord rank progression

⭐ Galxe loyalty points

Submit your application and join the ranks.

👉 https://www.adreva.ai/ad-army

⭐ Get Started

⚔️ Join the Ad Army
https://www.adreva.ai/ad-army

📢 Advertise in the Weekly Attention Campaign
https://www.adreva.ai/weekly-attention-campaign

🎯 Participate in Early Access Quests
https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA

Welcome to the Adreva Attention Economy.

Phase I begins now. 🚀

description:

description:
**The Green Wave is here!** dkarbon is redefining the Carbon Credit market and we want the world to hear our voice. This isn't just a quest; it's a community movement to bring transparency and sustainability on-chain.

Join us as an early supporter, help us spread the word across the Web3 space, and secure your place in our growing ecosystem. The more we grow, the stronger our impact on the planet will be. Get ready to ride the wave and claim your rewards!".

description:
Commence la mission en rejoignant la communauté Bybit EU 🇫🇷.

name: ADREVA  Early Access Quests
description:
# 🚀 Adreva Is Launching Phase I of the Attention Economy

For years, consumers have been treated like passive products to be monetized — not active participants.
Their attention powers the entire digital economy, yet the people creating that value had no say in the process and received nothing in return.

Today, Adreva changes that equation.

Instead of extracting value, Adreva treats users as partners in the attention economy — directing and sharing in the value their attention creates.
Today we launch Phase I of the Attention Economy, where advertisers compete for community attention and users earn rewards for engaging.

## This system is powered by two core programs:
## 1️⃣ Weekly Attention Campaign (WAC)
Where users engage with and amplify projects
👉 https://www.adreva.ai/weekly-attention-campaign
## 2️⃣ Adreva Ad Army
A community referral program for bringing advertisers to Adreva
👉 https://www.adreva.ai/ad-army

--

# 📢 Weekly Attention Campaign (WAC)
Advertisers secure campaign slots and the community engages and amplifies projects through:

🏆 Leaderboard competitions
⭐ Galxe quests
📣 Social engagement
🎨 Creative contests

Projects can secure participation on a first-come-first-served basis.

🥉 Bronze — $100
🥈 Silver — $200
🥇 Gold — $300

👉  https://www.adreva.ai/weekly-attention-campaign

# ⚔️ Adreva Ad Army
The Ad Army allows community members to earn rewards by referring advertisers to Adreva.
Members receive:

💰 25% USDC commission
🏆 Leaderboard points & prizes
⚔️ Discord rank progression
⭐ Galxe loyalty points
Submit your application and join the ranks.

👉 https://www.adreva.ai/ad-army

--

# ⭐ Get Started

## ⚔️ Join the Ad Army
https://www.adreva.ai/ad-army
## 📢 Advertise in the Weekly Attention Campaign
https://www.adreva.ai/weekly-attention-campaign 
## 🎯 Participate in Early Access Quests
https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA

Welcome to the Adreva Attention Economy.
Phase I begins now. 🚀

name: RivrDEX is celebrating 50,000 transactions on testnet.
description:
***It took you exactly 1 month to make 2.5x more transactions while testing our DEX than in the previous month.***

Let’s once again remember which actions you performed most often:
🔹More than **37,000** swaps were made.

Thank you all for helping with the testing, and especially for the feedback you continue to leave.

To celebrate this event, we decided to launch a special quest on Galxe.

This quest isn’t an easy one, because we created a special quiz that only true experts will be able to complete.

What about the rewards?
🔹Galxe points that determine your place on the leaderboard.
🔹100 $USDT that will be distributed through a raffle among several lucky winners.

Duration?
🔹Starts today
🔹Deadline - March 31 at 12:00 AM

Join the quest and do your best to get the highest place possible on the leaderboard.

name: Upload your Apple Health data & Grab 20,000 $DATA Points!
description:
**Download and share your anonymized Apple Health data to earn more $DATA points.**

Description:
1. Open the Health app on your iOS device.
2. Tap your picture or initials in the top-right corner.
3. Scroll down and tap Export All Health Data.
4. Email or AirDrop the Health Data file to your computer.
5. Upload the .zip archive on this page using the  Upload Health Data button, then click Verify. 
6.  After your Health Data is verified, you will receive your $DATA points.

name: Adreva Early Access "Ad Rebel" Role
description:
# New Role Quest — Ad Rebel

We’ve launched a new Galxe quest to unlock the Ad Rebel role in the Adreva community.

https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA

Ad Rebel NFT — Coming Next

### The Ad Rebel role will be required to claim the upcoming **Ad Rebel NFT**.

This NFT design will be modeled after the winners of the ongoing Community Creative Competitions, which stop accepting submissions on March 14.

https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA/GCbnFtYrYM

Once the design submissions have been voted on by the community and the winners finalized - the **Ad Rebel NFT claim quest will open for** **Ad Rebel role holders ONLY.**

## Important Update on Previous Rewards

The following early launch rewards are no longer available:

- **Ad Warrior Discord role** is no longer available to claim.
- **Ad Warrior NFT** — 2,194 issued
- **Proof of Attention (POA) NFT** — 1,826 issued

These were part of Adreva launch week and will no longer be issued going forward.

**The Ad Rebel role now replaces it as the primary gateway role for future campaigns, rewards, and NFT claims.**

## On-Chain Records

**Ad Warrior NFT**
https://basescan.org/token/0xe118ddb1ced180be869975c4879e71af7f1bb746

**Proof of Attention POAP**
https://basescan.org/token/0x7f9d42dae943d38fed838ccf959e56f455c4321a

## What This Means

The "Ad Rebel" role becomes the new user gateway for upcoming campaigns, rewards, and NFT claims in the Adreva ecosystem.

## Complete the quest and join the rebellion.

name: Blockopedia $100 USDT News Quiz Raffle
description:
Stay updated with the biggest stories shaping crypto, DeFi, and AI.

Visit the featured Blockopedia article, read the update, and answer 3 questions based on the story.

Participants who complete the quest will be entered into a $100 USDT raffle, with winners selected at the end of the campaign.

name: ADREVA Creative Prize Claim
description:
A quest for Week 1 Creative Competition Grand Prize Winners to claim their USDC Reward!

https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA/GCbnFtYrYM

You must have one of the following Discord roles to claim your prize!

#### Ad Architect
#### Sticker Master
#### Memelord

### **ALL PRIZES MUST BE CLAIMED BY MARCH 21, 00:00:00 UTC**

---

Adreva is launching three (3) weekly community competitions to reward creativity and help grow the ecosystem.

Participants create content on X (Twitter), submit their entry through Galxe, and compete for prizes and special community roles.

---

### How it works:


* Create your content and post it on X tagging @Adreva_Network

* Submit the X link through this Galxe quest

* The Adreva team reviews all submissions and selects the Top 10

* Top entries are posted in Discord & Telegram for community voting

* Winners are determined by community polls
---


### Weekly Competitions



#### Ad Architect
Create ads, explainers, or educational content about Adreva.


#### Sticker Master
Design an original Adreva-themed sticker.


#### Memelord
Create an original Adreva meme.

---
Each competition awards one Grand Prize winner, plus recognition for runners-up.

Grand Prize (per competition):
* $25 USDC
* Special Discord role
* 5 Loyalty Points Mystery Boxes
* Featured on Adreva social channels

Grand prize USDC will be distributed via another Galxe Quest using Discord roles for verification.

Second and third place winners receive **3 Loyalty Points Mystery Boxes and community recognition**.


### **ALL PRIZES MUST BE CLAIMED BY MARCH 21, 00:00:00 UTC**


Stay creative and help build the future of privacy-first advertising with Adreva. 🚀#### Sticker Master#### Sticker Master#### Ad Architect

name: Upload your Amazon Orders data & Grab 15,000 $DATA Points!
description:
**Download and share your anonymized Amazon order data to earn more $DATA points.**

Description
1. Make sure your DataHive AI extension is online.
2. Go to https://www.amazon.com and sign in to your Amazon account.
3. Scroll down to the Manage Your Data section and click Request your data.

![SCR-20260217-nhlk.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/84181/09d5ed32-cdbf-4c82-82b8-9bbc3ba5ea0c.png)
4. On the Request your data page, click Submit Request for Your Orders.

![SCR-20260217-nilw.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/84181/4890740a-0e78-474e-930e-69b9ab490d39.png)
5. You will receive an email with the subject Your Data Request Confirmation. Click the Confirm Data Request button in the email.

![SCR-20260217-njju.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/84181/5ff65383-a01b-4913-b867-0b5e5c0fc3dd.png)
6. Within a few days, you will receive another email with your Amazon data archive. Upload it on this screen using the Upload Amazon Data button, then click Verify.
7. After we verify your Amazon data, you will receive your $DATA points.

name: Connect Amazon & Grab 500 $DATA Points!
description:
Boost your ranking and secure your spot in the upcoming airdrop! By connecting your Amazon account to the DataHive AI dashboard, you will instantly unlock a 500 $DATA points boost. Your contribution helps us crawl high-quality product data, and in return, you earn a direct stake in our ecosystem rewards.

Step-by-Step Guide:
1. Stay Active: Ensure your DataHive AI extension is installed and online.
2. Connect: Go to Amazon.com and log in to your account.
3. Sync: Once logged in, the extension will verify your session.
4. Claim: Return to this Galxe page to verify the task and collect your 500 points!

name: Start DataHive AI Missions & Claim Your Points Now!
description: By sharing anonymized data, you're not just earning points - you're contributing to more accurate, globally representative AI models. Privacy-first, always. Join Hive!
